title: Update contact email address to sv.couverture95@gmail.com

requirements.text: Replace the existing email address with 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' in all locations where an email address appears across the site: the Contact section info card, the Footer contact details, and the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data in index.html (if an email field is present). The email must be displayed as a clickable mailto: link and formatted consistently everywhere it appears.

quotes: Change aussi l'adresse email pour sv.couverture95@gmail.com

acceptanceCriteria: The email 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' appears in the Contact section info card.
The email 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' appears in the Footer contact details.
If an email field exists in the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data in index.html, it is updated to 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com'.
Every displayed email is a clickable mailto:sv.couverture95@gmail.com link.
No old or placeholder email address remains anywhere on the site.

constraints: Do not change any phone numbers, address, or other contact details.
Do not modify files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding a contact form email submission backend.
Changing any other content, styling, or layout.
